Use this template if you want something to be easier, clearer, or newly supported.

Example: "Add a simpler landing page section that explains Demo Mode for first-time users."

## What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any other approaches you considered.

## Extra context

Add mockups, references, or examples here if they help explain the request.
